name: dev-utils-ref
title: Dev Utils Ref
description: Reference tables, lookups, language references, and Chinese text tools
author: iptodays

commands.name: ascii-table
commands.title: ASCII Table
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Reference table of ASCII characters (0–127) with decimal, hex, and char

commands.name: http-status
commands.title: HTTP Status Codes
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Searchable reference of HTTP status codes with descriptions

commands.name: mime-lookup
commands.title: MIME Type Lookup
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Lookup MIME types by file extension

commands.name: ports-reference

commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Searchable table of common TCP/UDP port numbers

commands.name: unix-perms-ref
commands.title: Unix Permissions Reference
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Reference for Unix file permissions, SUID, SGID, and sticky bit

commands.name: color-palette
commands.title: Color Palette Generator
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Generate complementary, triadic, analogous, and monochromatic color palettes

commands.name: country-codes
commands.title: Country Codes
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Look up ISO alpha-2 / alpha-3 country codes by country name

commands.name: language-codes
commands.title: Language Codes
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Look up ISO 639-1 / 639-2 language codes by language name

commands.name: unicode-lookup
commands.title: Unicode Lookup
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Look up Unicode character details by code point or character

commands.name: named-colors
commands.title: Named CSS Colors
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Browse 140+ named CSS colors with hex and RGB values

commands.name: emoji-picker
commands.title: Emoji Picker
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Search and copy emoji characters by name or keyword

commands.name: css-layout-ref
commands.title: CSS Flexbox / Grid Reference
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Quick reference for CSS Flexbox and Grid properties

commands.name: js-methods-ref
commands.title: JS Array & String Methods
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Quick reference for JavaScript Array and String methods with signatures

commands.name: http-methods-ref
commands.title: HTTP Methods Reference
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Reference for HTTP methods with safe and idempotent properties

commands.name: git-reference
commands.title: Git Command Reference
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Searchable quick reference for common Git commands with examples

commands.name: docker-reference
commands.title: Docker Command Reference
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Searchable quick reference for common Docker and Docker Compose commands

commands.name: dockerfile-reference
commands.title: Dockerfile Reference
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Quick reference for Dockerfile instructions with examples

commands.name: nginx-reference
commands.title: Nginx Config Reference
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Searchable reference for common Nginx directives with examples

commands.name: regex-patterns
commands.title: Common Regex Patterns
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Quick reference for common regex patterns (email, URL, IP, phone, etc.)

commands.name: regex-syntax
commands.title: Regex Syntax Reference
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Quick reference for regex syntax, quantifiers, groups, lookaheads, and more

commands.name: chinese-char-info
commands.title: 汉字信息 (Char Info)
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Analyze Chinese characters: radical, estimated strokes, Unicode codepoint

commands.name: chinese-number
commands.title: 中文数字转换 (Numbers)
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Convert between Arabic numerals and Chinese numbers (一二三 / 壹贰叁)

commands.name: chinese-pinyin
commands.title: 汉字 → 拼音 (Pinyin)
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Convert Chinese characters to Pinyin with tone marks

commands.name: chinese-script
commands.title: 简繁转换 (Script)
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Convert between Simplified (简体) and Traditional (繁體) Chinese

commands.name: chinese-segment
commands.title: 中文分词 (Segment)
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Segment Chinese text into words using dictionary-based matching

commands.name: chinese-slug
commands.title: 中文拼音 Slug (Slug)
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Generate Pinyin-based URL slugs from Chinese titles

commands.name: chinese-unicode
commands.title: 中文编码分析 (Unicode)
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils Ref
commands.description: Analyze Chinese text Unicode codepoints and UTF-8 encoding
